title: Patrol Feed Failover
subtitle: Live patrol feed drops whenever one API node fails
objective: Build redundancy in ingress and processing so a single API failure does not break delivery.
constraints: Maintain async delivery under API failures

concepts.title: Redundant Ingress
concepts.description: Route clients through a load balancer in front of APIs.

concepts.title: Buffered Delivery
concepts.description: Queue and worker absorb temporary API node failures.

concepts.title: Durable Writes
concepts.description: Workers should persist processed events into storage.
